ucs.title: [LLM] PROMETHIUM/StrongPity trojanized installer dropper chain (Downloads→%AppData% drop→Run/Service persistence)
ucs.description: Hunts the signature StrongPity delivery pattern: a user-executed installer masquerading as a legitimate utility (WinRAR, 7-Zip, TrueCrypt, VPN client, Notepad++, etc.) — typically delivered via watering-hole / lookalike download portals or ISP-level redirection — that drops a secondary executable into %AppData%/%ProgramData% within minutes and immediately establishes Run-key or service persistence. This three-stage temporal chain is characteristic of PROMETHIUM/StrongPity droppers and is rarely seen from benign installers, which write to %ProgramFiles% and use the legitimate Windows Installer
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as installerTime values(Processes.process) as installer_cmd values(Processes.process_path) as installer_path from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_path IN ("*\\Downloads\\*","*\\Temp\\*","*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*") OR Processes.process_path IN ("*\\Downloads\\*","*\\Temp\\*")) AND (Processes.process_name IN ("*setup*.exe","*install*.exe","wrar*.exe","winrar*.exe","7z*.exe","truecrypt*.exe","veracrypt*.exe","*vpn*.exe","npp*.exe","notepad++*.exe","firefox*.exe","chrome*setup*.exe","teamviewer*.exe","skype*.exe","driverpack*.exe","ccleaner*.exe","opera*.exe")) by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process_guid | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename process_guid as installer_guid | join type=inner host user [ | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as dropTime values(Filesystem.file_path) as dropped_path values(Filesystem.file_name) as dropped_file from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*","*\\AppData\\Local\\*","*\\ProgramData\\*") AND (Filesystem.file_name="*.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.dll") by host Filesystem.user Filesystem.process_guid | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | rename process_guid as installer_guid ] | join type=inner host user [ | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as persistTime values(Registry.registry_path) as persist_key values(Registry.registry_value_data) as persist_value from datamodel=Endpoint.Registry where Registry.registry_path IN ("*\\CurrentVersion\\Run\\*","*\\CurrentVersion\\RunOnce\\*","*\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\*\\ImagePath") by host Registry.user ] | eval drop_lag=dropTime-installerTime, persist_lag=persistTime-installerTime | where drop_lag>=0 AND drop_lag<=600 AND persist_lag>=0 AND persist_lag<=1800 | eval risk_signal="PROMETHIUM_StrongPity_dropper_chain" | table installerTime host user installer_cmd installer_path dropped_file dropped_path persist_key persist_value drop_lag persist_lag
ucs.kql:
let installer_tokens = dynamic(["setup","install","winrar","wrar","7zip","7z","truecrypt","veracrypt","vpn","npp","notepad++","firefox","chrome","teamviewer","skype","driverpack","ccleaner","opera"]);
let droppers =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where FolderPath has_any (@"\Downloads\", @"\Temp\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\")
    | where FileName has_any (installer_tokens)
    | project InstallerTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName=InitiatingProcessAccountName,
              InstallerName=FileName, InstallerPath=FolderPath, InstallerSha=SHA256,
              InstallerProcessId=ProcessId, InstallerCmd=ProcessCommandLine;
let drops =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where FolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\AppData\Local\", @"\ProgramData\")
    | where FileName endswith ".exe" or FileName endswith ".dll"
    | where not(FolderPath has_any (@"\Microsoft\", @"\Packages\", @"\WindowsApps\"))
    | project DropTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DroppedFile=FileName, DroppedPath=FolderPath,
              DroppedSha=SHA256, InitiatingProcessId, InitiatingProcessFileName;
let persistence =
    union
    (DeviceRegistryEvents
        | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
        | where ActionType in ("RegistryValueSet","RegistryKeyCreated")
        | where RegistryKey has_any (@"\CurrentVersion\Run", @"\CurrentVersion\RunOnce", @"\Services\")
        | project PersistTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, PersistArtifact=strcat(RegistryKey,"=",RegistryValueData), PersistInitiator=InitiatingProcessId),
    (DeviceProcessEvents
        | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
        | where FileName =~ "sc.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "create"
        | project PersistTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, PersistArtifact=ProcessCommandLine, PersistInitiator=InitiatingProcessId);
droppers
| join kind=inner drops on DeviceId
| where DropTime between (InstallerTime .. InstallerTime + 10m)
| where InitiatingProcessId == InstallerProcessId or InitiatingProcessFileName =~ InstallerName
| join kind=inner persistence on DeviceId
| where PersistTime between (InstallerTime .. InstallerTime + 30m)
| extend DropLagSec = datetime_diff('second', DropTime, InstallerTime),
         PersistLagSec = datetime_diff('second', PersistTime, InstallerTime),
         ActorHypothesis = "PROMETHIUM / StrongPity (G0056) dropper chain"
| project InstallerTime, DeviceName, AccountName, InstallerName, InstallerPath, InstallerSha,
          DroppedFile, DroppedPath, DroppedSha, PersistArtifact, DropLagSec, PersistLagSec, ActorHypothesis
| sort by InstallerTime desc
ucs.rationale: This isn't a generic 'installer drops file' rule — it encodes the exact StrongPity tradecraft Talos and Microsoft (MSTIC) documented in the 2016 SIR Vol 21 NEODYMIUM/PROMETHIUM report and the June-2020 Talos StrongPity4 writeup: PROMETHIUM clones publisher download portals (and at times leverages ISP-level injection on Türk Telekom infrastructure), serves a working but trojanized version of common
